score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 最低端

condition.zh: 短期紧缩，拐点在 4-6 周内

summary.en: USD liquidity remains in short-term tightening mode. Net liquidity has drained $306B over two weeks — the most severe two-week drawdown of 2026. Bank reserves remain below $3T. However, TGA is approaching its seasonal peak and is expected to unwind in mid-May, releasing $200-300B back into the system. SOFR remains stable. The 4-6 week resolution window is intact.
summary.zh: 美元流动性仍处于短期紧缩状态。净流动性两周蒸发 3060 亿美元——2026 年最严峻的两周抽水。银行准备金仍低于 3 万亿美元。但 TGA 接近季节性顶部，预计 5 月中旬开始回落，向系统释放 2000-3000 亿美元。SOFR 保持稳定。4-6 周化解窗口依然有效。

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no meaningful liquidity buffer
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无实质性流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$227.4B WoW — near seasonal peak, unwind expected mid-May
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +2274 亿美元——接近季节性顶部，预计 5 月中旬回落

net_liquidity_change.zh: -2150 亿美元（周环比）/ -3060 亿美元（两周）——2026 年最严峻两周抽水

details.en: The liquidity picture is unchanged from prior days — near-term stress persists, but the medium-term path is improving. The critical new development is the Trump-Powell conflict: if Fed independence is genuinely threatened, the bond market reaction could create a secondary liquidity shock independent of TGA dynamics. SOFR stability is the key indicator to watch — it remains the best real-time signal of whether funding stress is systemic or contained.
details.zh: 流动性状况与前几日相比没有变化——近期压力持续，但中期路径正在改善。关键新进展是 Trump-Powell 冲突：如果美联储独立性真正受到威胁，债券市场的反应可能独立于 TGA 动态创造二次流动性冲击。SOFR 稳定性是需要关注的关键指标——它仍然是资金压力是系统性还是局部性的最佳实时信号。

reason.en: TGA surged $227B WoW to $924B, net liquidity drained $306B over two weeks, bank reserves at $2.98T below the $3T threshold, Fed repo lending elevated. SOFR remains stable — no systemic stress yet. TGA inflection expected mid-May. Score held at 40 as no new deterioration but no improvement either. The Trump-Powell conflict adds a tail risk that is not yet priced into this score.
reason.zh: TGA 单周暴增 2270 亿美元至 9244 亿美元，净流动性两周抽水 3060 亿美元，银行准备金 2.98 万亿美元低于 3 万亿美元门槛，美联储回购贷款偏高。SOFR 保持稳定——尚无系统性压力。TGA 拐点预计 5 月中旬。分数维持 40，因为没有新的恶化，但也没有改善。Trump-Powell 冲突增加了尚未在此分数中定价的尾部风险。

reason.en: 88% beat rate, Q1 earnings growth at 13.2%, revenue growth at 9.9% (three-year high). Earnings fundamentals remain strong. However, Forward P/E at 20.9x is stretched, and the beat-and-drop price reaction pattern is a deduction. This week is critical: Tesla and Alphabet report. If mega-cap tech also shows beat-and-drop, the market narrative shifts from 'earnings support' to 'good news already priced in' — which would be a significant negative.
reason.zh: 超预期率 88%，Q1 盈利增长 13.2%，收入增长 9.9%（三年新高）。盈利基本面依然强劲。但前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍偏高，「超预期后下跌」价格反应模式是扣分项。本周是关键：Tesla 和 Alphabet 将报告财报。如果大型科技股也出现「超预期后下跌」，市场叙事将从「盈利支撑」转变为「好消息已在价格里」——这将是重大负面信号。

reason.en: 58.84% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day MA — slipping back below the 60% threshold after briefly crossing it. The WSJ flagged 'Bad Breadth' as a concern. However, the NYSE A/D Line made a new high, which is a positive confirmation. The breadth picture is mixed: the A/D Line is constructive, but the 200DMA participation rate is hesitating. Score reduced from 62 to 55 as the 60% threshold failed to hold.
reason.zh: 标普 500 中 58.84% 的股票位于 200 日均线上方——在短暂突破 60% 门槛后滑回。《华尔街日报》将「广度不足」列为担忧。但 NYSE A/D 线创新高，这是正面确认。广度图景喜忧参半：A/D 线具有建设性，但 200 日均线参与率在犹豫。由于 60% 门槛未能守住，分数从 62 降至 55。

reason.en: VIX surged +7.95% to 18.87 — volatility is repricing risk. S&P pulled back from the 7,126 high to 7,106. Trump's threat to fire Powell is creating a risk premium in equities and bonds. DXY at 98.07 and Gold at $4,842 are pricing in dollar credibility concerns. The price signal is the weakest component this week. A VIX above 20 would be a clear negative signal.
reason.zh: VIX 暴涨 +7.95% 至 18.87——波动率正在重新定价风险。标普从 7,126 高点回落至 7,106。Trump 威胁解雇 Powell 正在股票和债券中创造风险溢价。DXY 98.07 和黄金 $4,842 正在定价美元信誉担忧。价格信号是本周最弱的组成部分。VIX 突破 20 将是明确的负面信号。

trading_summary.en:
50.8 — Moderate floor. Wind not at our back. Liquidity tightening ($306B drained), VIX surging, Trump-Powell crisis escalating, breadth hesitating at 60%. But earnings strong, credit healthy, rate cut probability jumped above 50%.

Sit on hands, wait for wind to change. This week: Tesla/Alphabet earnings + Trump-Powell dynamics are key catalysts. Add conditions: TGA below $750B + breadth stable above 60% + VIX below 16 + Trump-Powell de-escalation. Meet three to consider adding.
trading_summary.zh:
50.8分，Moderate 最低端。风不在背后——流动性紧缩（两周蒸发 $306B）、VIX 上升、Trump-Powell 危机升级、广度在 60% 犹豫。但盈利强劲、信用健康、降息预期升至 50%+。

坐在手上等风向变。本周催化剂：Tesla/Alphabet 财报 + Trump-Powell 动态。加码条件：TGA 回落至 $750B 以下 + 广度稳定 60%+ + VIX 回落至 16 以下 + Trump-Powell 缓和，满足三个再考虑。

trading_quote: Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing.

note.en: Pulling back from 7,126 high — healthy consolidation or start of correction?
note.zh: 从 7,126 高点回落——健康整理还是回调开始？

note.en: Good Friday — market closed; futures indicated lower open
note.zh: 耶稣受难日——市场休市；期货显示低开
温和回调，守住 49,000 支撑位上方

note.en: Small caps outperforming — positive breadth signal
note.zh: 小盘股跑赢——正面广度信号

note.en: Stable — Trump-Powell fears not yet causing bond market stress
note.zh: 稳定——Trump-Powell 担忧尚未引发债市压力

note.en: Rate cut probability above 50% — supportive for equities
note.zh: 降息概率升至 50% 以上——对股市有支撑

note.en: Dollar weakening — Trump-Powell conflict pricing dollar credibility risk
note.zh: 美元走弱——Trump-Powell 冲突定价美元信誉风险

note.en: Holding near all-time highs — safe haven demand + dollar credibility concerns
note.zh: 守住接近历史高位——避险需求 + 美元信誉担忧
持续走弱——需求担忧持续
反弹——守住 $75K 上方，正面信号

note.en: Volatility surging — risk repricing underway, watch for 20+ breach
note.zh: 波动率飙升——风险重新定价，关注是否突破 20

analysis.en: BTC recovered +2.78% to $75,875, reclaiming the $75K level after the weekend pullback. This is a constructive price action — holding above $75K is technically positive. The recovery amid broader equity market uncertainty (VIX +7.95%, Trump-Powell conflict) suggests BTC is increasingly acting as a safe-haven asset alongside gold. Fear & Greed at 55 (Neutral) shows balanced sentiment. Exchange net outflows continue. Key watch: sustained close above $77,500 would signal continuation toward $80,000.
analysis.zh: BTC 反弹 +2.78% 至 $75,875，在周末回调后重新收复 $75K 水平。这是建设性的价格行为——守住 $75K 上方在技术上是正面的。在更广泛的股市不确定性（VIX +7.95%，Trump-Powell 冲突）中的反弹表明 BTC 越来越像黄金一样作为避险资产。恐惧贪婪指数 55（中性）显示情绪均衡。交易所净流出持续。关键关注：持续收盘于 $77,500 以上将发出向 $80,000 延续的信号。

gold_silver_note.en: Elevated — dollar credibility risk adding to structural bull case
gold_silver_note.zh: 偏高——美元信誉风险强化结构性看涨逻辑

key_driver.zh: 避险需求 + 美元信誉风险

key_driver_detail.en: Trump-Powell conflict + central bank buying + geopolitical risk + weak DXY at 98.07
key_driver_detail.zh: Trump-Powell 冲突 + 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险 + 美元走弱（DXY 98.07）

analysis.en: Gold holds near all-time highs at $4,842.40, up +0.28%. The Trump-Powell conflict has added a new dimension to the gold bull case: dollar credibility risk. If Fed independence is genuinely threatened, the structural case for gold strengthens significantly — it becomes not just a safe haven but a hedge against dollar debasement. DXY at 98.07 and gold near all-time highs are both pricing this risk. The gold/silver ratio at 88.3 remains historically elevated.
analysis.zh: 黄金在接近历史高位的 $4,842.40 守稳，上涨 +0.28%。Trump-Powell 冲突为黄金看涨逻辑增添了新维度：美元信誉风险。如果美联储独立性真正受到威胁，黄金的结构性看涨逻辑将大幅强化——它不仅是避险资产，还是对冲美元贬值的工具。DXY 98.07 和黄金接近历史高位都在定价这一风险。金银比 88.3 仍处历史高位。

title.en: Trump-Powell Conflict — Fed Independence Tail Risk
title.zh: Trump-Powell 冲突——美联储独立性尾部风险

description.en: Trump's threat to fire Fed Chair Powell is the largest tail risk in the market. If Fed independence is genuinely compromised, the bond market reaction could be severe — 10Y yields spiking, dollar collapsing, gold surging. Gold at $4,842 and DXY at 98.07 are already pricing in some of this risk. The base case is that legal constraints prevent actual removal, but the uncertainty itself is damaging. This risk alone justifies holding more cash than the composite score suggests.
description.zh: Trump 威胁解雇美联储主席 Powell 是市场中最大的尾部风险。如果美联储独立性真正受损，债券市场的反应可能是严峻的——10Y 收益率飙升、美元崩盘、黄金大涨。黄金 $4,842 和 DXY 98.07 已经在定价部分这一风险。基准情景是法律约束阻止实际解雇，但不确定性本身已经造成伤害。仅此风险就足以证明持有比综合分数建议更多的现金是合理的。

description.en: VIX surged from 17.48 to 18.87 (+7.95%) in a single session. Breadth slipped back below 60% (58.84%). The combination of rising VIX, breadth hesitation, and the Trump-Powell conflict creates a fragile setup. A VIX move above 20 would signal a more significant risk-off episode. This week's Tesla and Alphabet earnings are key — if beat-and-drop spreads to mega-cap tech, VIX could spike further.
description.zh: VIX 单日从 17.48 暴涨至 18.87（+7.95%）。广度滑回 60% 以下（58.84%）。VIX 上升、广度犹豫和 Trump-Powell 冲突的组合创造了脆弱的格局。VIX 突破 20 将预示更重大的风险规避事件。本周 Tesla 和 Alphabet 财报是关键——如果「超预期后下跌」扩散至大型科技股，VIX 可能进一步飙升。

title.en: Tesla / Alphabet Earnings — Mega-Cap Beat-and-Drop Risk
title.zh: Tesla / Alphabet 财报——大型科技「超预期后下跌」风险

description.en: This week, Tesla and Alphabet report earnings — two of the most market-cap-weighted stocks in the S&P 500 and Nasdaq. The beat-and-drop pattern has already spread across healthcare (Abbott) and financials (Schwab, Goldman Sachs). If it now spreads to mega-cap tech, the market narrative fundamentally shifts. Alphabet's ad revenue and Tesla's delivery numbers are the specific data points to watch. A beat-and-drop in either would be a significant negative signal for the broader market.
description.zh: 本周 Tesla 和 Alphabet 报告财报——是标普 500 和 Nasdaq 中市值权重最大的股票之一。「超预期后下跌」模式已经在医疗（Abbott）和金融（嘉信理财、高盛）板块扩散。如果现在扩散至大型科技股，市场叙事将发生根本性转变。Alphabet 的广告收入和 Tesla 的交付数据是需要关注的具体数据点。任何一个出现「超预期后下跌」都将是更广泛市场的重大负面信号。

status.zh: 活跃——VIX 背离 + 「超预期后下跌」扩散

description.en: Two active divergence signals: (1) VIX surged +7.95% to 18.87 while S&P only declined -0.28% — volatility is repricing risk faster than price is declining. This divergence typically precedes larger price moves. (2) Beat-and-drop pattern continues across healthcare and financials. The key test this week is whether mega-cap tech (Tesla, Alphabet) joins the pattern. If yes, the divergence becomes a market-wide signal rather than a sector-specific one.
description.zh: 两个活跃的背离信号：（1）VIX 暴涨 +7.95% 至 18.87，而标普仅下跌 -0.28%——波动率重新定价风险的速度快于价格下跌。这种背离通常先于更大的价格波动。（2）「超预期后下跌」模式在医疗和金融板块持续。本周的关键测试是大型科技股（Tesla、Alphabet）是否加入该模式。如果是，背离将成为全市场信号而非板块特定信号。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, DJI, BTC, Gold, VIX

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
